features.title: Organizational Cortex MVP
features.summary: Create an executive-grade simulation showing how student, teacher, and engineering interactions become signals, organizational memory, recommendations, and measurable outcomes.

features.title: Executive AI-Native Landing
features.summary: Transform the initial landing into a five-minute executive narrative covering the transformation case, current-state hypotheses, future operating model, strategic choices, architecture, economics, risks, and first 90 days.

features.title: Student Digital Twin
features.summary: Create a privacy-aware, explainable learner-state workspace that separates evidence, inference, uncertainty, human intervention decisions, projected outcomes, and validated learning impact.

features.title: Teacher Intelligence Platform
features.summary: Demonstrate how high-performing teaching behaviors are identified and converted into measurable recommendations that improve the broader teacher population.

features.title: Agentic Build Engine
features.summary: Visualize the spec-to-deploy engineering loop, agent roles, evaluation coverage, review gates, and delivery evidence.

features.title: AI-Native Transformation Blueprint
features.summary: Generate the CEO, CFO, and Board transformation document from approved program specifications and architecture decisions.
